title: Inst. Mohammed Jouma HAMDOUSH
content:
Inst. Mohammed Jouma HAMDOUSH

mjhamdoush@29mayis.edu.tr

Resume

Full Time

Resume

Lect. Mohammed Jouma Hamdoush graduated from the Faculty of Theology at the University of Damascus in 2005, where he also completed his pedagogical formation training in 2006. He pursued his graduate studies at the same university, earning his Master’s degree in Islamic Law in 2014. Currently, he is continuing his academic research as a doctoral candidate in the PhD program in Arabic Literature at Gümüşhane University.

Throughout his professional career, Hamdoush has served as a lecturer at various educational institutions across Syria and Türkiye. In addition to his teaching experience, he worked as an editor for several publishing houses between 2001 and 2009, an experience that contributed to his academic development and expertise in textual analysis.

Since joining Istanbul 29 Mayıs University, he has been serving as a Lecturer in the Arabic Preparatory Program at the School of Foreign Languages. His academic interests and professional expertise encompass Islamic Law, Arabic Literature, and the development of instructional methodologies for language acquisition.
